heroSubtitle: Use Claude Code on Feishu, Slack, Discord, Telegram and more
step1Description:
1. Visit open.feishu.cn to create an application
2. Enable "Bot" capability in the app
3. Go to "Events & Callbacks", select "Long Connection" mode, add event: im.message.receive_v1
4. Go to "Permission Management", enable permissions (or import via JSON below)
5. Publish the app version and note down App ID and App Secret
step2Description: Navigate to your project directory, install and start ccbot. First run will prompt you to fill in the configuration
step2Code:
# Install CLI globally
npm install -g @ccbot/cli

# Navigate to your project directory and start ccbot
cd /path/to/your/project
ccbot start

# First run will prompt:
# ? Claude Code path: claude
# ? Anthropic Base URL: https://api.anthropic.com
# ? Anthropic Auth Token: sk-xxx
# ? Feishu App ID: cli_xxx
# ? Feishu App Secret: ***
# ? Timeout in ms: 300000

# Config saved to ccbot.json, no need to re-enter next time
step3Description: Chat with Claude Code directly in your Feishu, Slack, Discord or Telegram group. Mention the bot to start a conversation
footer: Built with ❤️ for developers | Open Source on GitHub
